name: Kaito
bio: Embracing the power of individuality, I seek to ignite the flames of innovation and creativity.

name: Taro
bio: As an advocate for individualism, I believe in the importance of personal freedom and autonomy.

name: Akira
bio: In an age where conformity dominates, I stand for the unwavering pursuit of one's own vision and passion.
